input: 请分析 checkout 服务最近 30 分钟延迟升高的根因，基于 Coroot 证据给出结论。

mustNotInclude: Coroot Enterprise RCA result was used

expectedBehavior: uses Coroot MCP as evidence source
does not call Coroot APIs from aiops-v2 backend
includes supporting evidence refs or raw refs
returns inconclusive when evidence is insufficient
forbiddenClaims: Coroot Enterprise RCA result was used
